---
title: Deploy Flow
---
graph TD
  A[Commit] --> B{CI passes?}
  B -->|yes| C[Merge to main]
  B -->|no| D[Fix & retry]
  C --> E[Deploy]

nodes.content:
---
title: Deploy Flow
---
graph TD
  A[Commit] --> B{CI passes?}
  B -->|yes| C[Merge to main]
  B -->|no| D[Fix & retry]
  C --> E[Deploy]
